meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Scale Your Freelance Workflow Faster
content.seo_description: Stop building from scratch. Use this SaaS starter kit framework with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver production-ready apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. You are stuck because you lack a modular SaaS starter kit that automates authentication, billing, and database schemas. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform your freelance workflow from manual coding into a high-speed, repeatable deployment engine.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. Another project, another blank repository, and another week spent wiring up boilerplate authentication instead of shipping value. You know the cycle: the initial spark of an idea quickly suffocates under the weight of repetitive setup tasks, leaving you exhausted before the real product work even begins.

But the era of the 'manual build' is dead. The elite tier of AI builders has moved toward a modular, accelerated architecture. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you reclaim your time, stop fighting technical debt, and pivot from a developer who 'writes code' to an architect who 'ships outcomes.'

steps.title: Define the Modular Schema
steps.description: Establish a core database architecture that separates user identity from application business logic, ensuring your starter kit remains multi-tenant capable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a multi-tenant PostgreSQL schema with Prisma ORM for a SaaS starter kit, including tables for users, organizations, subscriptions, and audit logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file prisma/schema.prisma --instruction 'Refine the user model to support RBAC and organization mapping'

steps.title: Implement Auth and Billing
steps.description: Wire up secure authentication and Stripe integration to ensure your starter kit is revenue-ready from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold an authentication flow using NextAuth.js with Stripe webhook integration for subscription management.

steps.title: Build the Component Library
steps.description: Standardize your UI to prevent design drift across multiple client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Shadcn/UI component library configuration optimized for high-conversion SaaS landing pages.

steps.title: Automate API Routing
steps.description: Create a standardized API handler pattern that enforces consistent error handling and response formatting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a generic API handler template for Next.js 14+ that includes Zod validation and consistent error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/app/api/lib/handler.ts --apply 'Implement standardized Zod middleware'

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure automated deployments to ensure that every push to your repository results in a production-ready build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for a Next.js SaaS app that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file .github/workflows/deploy.yml --instruction 'Optimize build caching for faster CI cycles'

pro_tips: Always use a monorepo structure to share types between your frontend and backend, reducing sync errors by 90%.
Keep your database migrations small and idempotent to avoid 'schema drift' when onboarding new client projects.
Inject AI-driven logging middleware into your starter kit to track user behavior patterns before you even launch.
Use feature flags in your starter kit; it allows you to ship broken code to production safely while you iterate.
Standardize your environment variables with a strict validation schema to prevent 'it works on my machine' bugs.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, build your first 'Vertical SaaS' project using the template to stress-test your architecture and identify missing reusable components.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading hours for dollars by building the same components over and over. Own your workflow, scale your output, and dominate the freelance market with your own custom SaaS engine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
